since_last: 41% of 86 AI names green; Chip Equipment & AI Hardware leads +1.78%; AI bubble risk 57 Heating Up.

cards.headline: The tape: broad selling, 41% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX +1.08% · BTC +2.75% · Gold -0.29% · Nasdaq100 +2.48%. 41% of 86 AI names are green — broad selling. Chip Equipment & AI Hardware is doing the heavy lifting at +1.78%.

cards.headline: Chip Equipment & AI Hardware leads, AI Applications & Data Software lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is Chip Equipment & AI Hardware at +1.78%; weakest is AI Applications & Data Software at -1.21%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: SMCI is the standout at +7.24%
cards.body: Leaders: SMCI +7.24%, MU +5.82%, VRT +3.96%, INTC +3.83%, TSM +3.27%. Laggards: SPCX -4.59%, AVAV -4.49%, SAP -3.03%, SMR -3.00%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) -4.59% at $176.51
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is -4.59% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 57 — Heating Up
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 57/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
